content: Hiii alya, thank you for the advice I'll go try it out and I'll probably swap Caecus if I pull corposant because I like playing Salvador haha... anyways I really appreciate the help ❤️

On a side note : you're eventually gonna want 5 functionnal teams. So I would suggest going through the whole awakeners trials on the last tab of the record button to find out what works for you and liberally swapping teams while going through the story mode.

[AT LEAST 160 FREE STANDARD PULLS]

Go to the thread below for helpful Beginner guides and Redemption codes 

https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1509396840330825758/1509396840330825758
